options.name: --compress
options.description: Compress the build context using gzip

name: -m
--memory
options.description: Set memory limit for the build container

options.name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not use cache when building the image

options.name: --no-rm
options.description: Do not remove intermediate containers after a successful build

options.name: --progress
options.description: Set type of progress output (auto, plain, tty)

options.name: --pull
options.description: Always attempt to pull a newer version of the image
